---
description: 'Always apply WCAG 2.2 Level AA accessibility standards'
applyTo: '{apps,packages}/**/*.{ts,html,scss}'
---

# Accessibility

Code MUST conform to [WCAG 2.2 Level AA](https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG22/). Use the `accessibility-a11y` skill for detailed guidance on specific patterns.

1. Before generating, plan how to implement WCAG 2.2 compliance.
2. After generating, review against WCAG 2.2 and iterate until accessible.

**Toolkit ARIA**: When using `@ngx-signal-forms/toolkit`, do NOT manually add `aria-invalid`, `aria-required`, or `aria-describedby` — these are managed automatically by `NgxSignalFormAutoAria`.
